title: Transform map onBefore script to normalize state values
question: Write an onBefore transform script that maps source values Open and Closed to incident state integers.
summary: Data import example that cleans source values before target insert/update.
exactAnswer: Use an onBefore transform script to inspect the source state text and set the target state field to the correct ServiceNow state value before the row is written.
steps: Map source state strings to the target integer state values.
Run the transform and validate the target records.
commonMistakes: Trying to map display values directly when the target field stores internal values.
Forgetting to handle unexpected source values.
explanation: onBefore transform scripts let you normalize data before target write.
